ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-11-2011 IN 220, DEFENDANT 3M COMPNAY'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL OF PLAINTIFFS' CLAIMS AGAINST 3M PENDING RESOLUTION OF APPEAL IN CRULL V. 3M COMPANY HELD. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT 3M COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL OF PLAINTIFFS' CLAIMS AGAINST 3M PENDING RESOLUTION OF APPEAL IN CRULL V. 3M CO. IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED BEFORE THE TRIAL JUDGE AND/OR IN THE EVENT 3M IS THE SOLE REMAINING DEFENDANT AND/OR TO TAKE INTO CONSIDERATION THE EFFECT ON JUDICIAL ECONOMY OF SEVERING 3M FROM THE REMAINING DEFENDANTS. THE MOTION IS A DE FACTO SEVERANCE MOTION, BUT FAILS TO ADDRESS, IN THE CONTEXT OF THE ENTIRE CASE, WHY SEVERING 3M FROM THE OTHER DEFENDANTS WOULD LEAD TO 'EXPEDITION AND ECONOMY.' (CCP 1048(B)).
